markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Screen Leah Myers for the Client Operations Manager role at GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/7iyJZCjs98vmT4-MKMpk5dR9wmRFsWgu?tab=summary&timestamp=171.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Strong Candidate-Role Fit:** Leah Myers's experience building operations from scratch (e.g., securing $60k for and implementing Vitaly at Apollo) directly matches GrowthX's need for a pioneer to unify fragmented systems.](https://fathom.video/share/7iyJZCjs98vmT4-MKMpk5dR9wmRFsWgu?tab=summary&timestamp=686.0)
  - [**Immediate Project Alignment:** Myers's specific experience with Vitaly is a direct solution, as GrowthX had demoed the platform but lacked the dedicated resource to implement it.](https://fathom.video/share/7iyJZCjs98vmT4-MKMpk5dR9wmRFsWgu?tab=summary&timestamp=827.0)
  - **Proven Problem-Solving:** Myers demonstrated a track record of solving critical operational issues, such as reducing chat first response times from \>1 hour to \<1 minute and securing CEO buy-in for key projects.
  - [**Iterative Adoption Strategy:** Myers advocates for an iterative approach to change management, a key lesson from past challenges that is well-suited for a fast-moving startup environment.](https://fathom.video/share/7iyJZCjs98vmT4-MKMpk5dR9wmRFsWgu?tab=summary&timestamp=1025.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX: The Opportunity

  - [**Business Model:** A one-year-old marketing agency ("dogfooding") an internal AI content platform, which will eventually become an external SaaS product.](https://fathom.video/share/7iyJZCjs98vmT4-MKMpk5dR9wmRFsWgu?tab=summary&timestamp=195.0)
  - [**Core Challenge:** Unifying fragmented systems (Linear, Notion, Figma) to gain visibility into client health, project status, and team capacity.](https://fathom.video/share/7iyJZCjs98vmT4-MKMpk5dR9wmRFsWgu?tab=summary&timestamp=1639.0)
  - [**Key Need:** A pioneer to implement a unified platform (like Vitaly) for project management, health scoring, and analytics, enabling Andi Bailey (Head of Customer Operations) to focus on strategic scaling.](https://fathom.video/share/7iyJZCjs98vmT4-MKMpk5dR9wmRFsWgu?tab=summary&timestamp=1750.0)

### Leah Myers: Relevant Experience

  - [**Career Path:** 10+ years in operations, moving from CPG to B2B SaaS (Jamf, Drift, Apollo).](https://fathom.video/share/7iyJZCjs98vmT4-MKMpk5dR9wmRFsWgu?tab=summary&timestamp=428.0)
  - [**Core Skill:** Building operations from scratch, with a focus on systems, data integration, and process optimization.](https://fathom.video/share/7iyJZCjs98vmT4-MKMpk5dR9wmRFsWgu?tab=summary&timestamp=474.0)
  - [**Apollo Case Study (Building CS Org):**](https://fathom.video/share/7iyJZCjs98vmT4-MKMpk5dR9wmRFsWgu?tab=summary&timestamp=686.0)
      - [**Problem:** No CS team or budget at a product-led growth company.](https://fathom.video/share/7iyJZCjs98vmT4-MKMpk5dR9wmRFsWgu?tab=summary&timestamp=709.0)
      - [**Action:** Mapped the customer journey to identify gaps, trialed CSPs (Catalyst, PlanHat, Vitaly), and secured CEO buy-in for a $60k Vitaly purchase.](https://fathom.video/share/7iyJZCjs98vmT4-MKMpk5dR9wmRFsWgu?tab=summary&timestamp=709.0)
      - [**Outcome:** Implemented Vitaly in 4–6 weeks, enabling the CS team to scale from 0 to 4,000 managed accounts in six months.](https://fathom.video/share/7iyJZCjs98vmT4-MKMpk5dR9wmRFsWgu?tab=summary&timestamp=873.0)
  - [**Apollo Case Study (Support Org Overhaul):**](https://fathom.video/share/7iyJZCjs98vmT4-MKMpk5dR9wmRFsWgu?tab=summary&timestamp=566.0)
      - [**Problem:** Fragmented support systems (Zendesk for email, Intercom for chat) with no unified metrics.](https://fathom.video/share/7iyJZCjs98vmT4-MKMpk5dR9wmRFsWgu?tab=summary&timestamp=566.0)
      - [**Action:** Consolidated all support into Intercom, deprecating Zendesk.](https://fathom.video/share/7iyJZCjs98vmT4-MKMpk5dR9wmRFsWgu?tab=summary&timestamp=566.0)
      - **Outcome:** Reduced chat first response times from \>1 hour to \<1 minute, providing clear executive visibility and enabling team-level OKRs.

### Problem-Solving & Data Philosophy

  - [**Prioritization Framework:** Uses customer journey mapping to find operational gaps, then prioritizes fixes by dollar value and strategic importance (e.g., retaining high-value customers).](https://fathom.video/share/7iyJZCjs98vmT4-MKMpk5dR9wmRFsWgu?tab=summary&timestamp=1082.0)
  - [**Data Philosophy:** Believes in making "data that was tucked away" actionable.](https://fathom.video/share/7iyJZCjs98vmT4-MKMpk5dR9wmRFsWgu?tab=summary&timestamp=1862.0)
      - [**Example:** At Apollo, refined utilization data definitions, pulled raw data directly from Snowflake into Vitaly (bypassing Salesforce), and built executive dashboards to show feature adoption.](https://fathom.video/share/7iyJZCjs98vmT4-MKMpk5dR9wmRFsWgu?tab=summary&timestamp=1862.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Andi Bailey:** Schedule a follow-up interview for Leah Myers with Bridget (VP of RevOps).](https://fathom.video/share/7iyJZCjs98vmT4-MKMpk5dR9wmRFsWgu?tab=summary&timestamp=2058.0)
